headline: Does Neudata Partnership Signal a Turning Point in State Street’s Data Strategy and Moat (STT)?
summary: On 3 March 2026, Neudata and State Street announced a partnership to scale State Street’s Data Intelligence capability, combining macroeconomic and market indicators with alternative datasets and showcasing these tools through sponsored 2026 global data summits in London, New York, Hong Kong, and San Francisco. This collaboration highlights State Street’s push to build an institutional-grade data intelligence business by embedding alternative data into real investment workflows and engaging...
